revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:旦椋神社 (宇治市)); add local discussion section + dated import note

revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96356044 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:旦椋神社 (宇治市) | revid=96356044 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=IP:59.146.181.165の作成した神社記事|date1=2009年1月15日 }} ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q11510876]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Asakura_Shrine_%28Uji%2C_Kyoto%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
